prefillPrompt: Find where my funnel is leaking

hero.headline: Your conversion rate dropped.
hero.headlineMuted: Find the exact leak in 8 seconds.
hero.subhead: Connect GA4, Google Ads, and Meta. Toffu reads every step, device, date, and traffic source. It shows you where users drop off and tells you why.

demo.content: My conversion rate dropped 34% this week. Where is it leaking?
Connecting to GA4 and Google Ads...
Analyzing 14,200 sessions across 6 funnel steps, last 14 days...

**Funnel Leak Report, Last 14 Days**
Sessions: 14,200 | Checkout starts: 1,840 | Purchases: 312 | CVR: 2.2% (was 3.3%)

---

**Drop-off Found: Checkout Step 2 (Payment)**

- Mobile CVR fell from 2.8% to 0.9% starting May 21
- Desktop CVR unchanged at 3.1%
- Affected traffic: Meta Ads mobile (71% of your volume)

**Most likely cause:** Payment form rendering issue on mobile Safari (iOS 17.5 update, May 20).

---

**Revenue impact:** ~$18,400 lost in 7 days at $59 AOV

**Recommended fix:**
1. Test checkout on iPhone iOS 17.5 now
2. Temporarily suppress mobile Meta spend until fixed
3. Shift budget to desktop campaigns ($4,200 available)

Say 'pause mobile adsets' and I'll do it now.

findings.title: The drop-off is always hiding somewhere specific.

items.title: Step-by-step funnel breakdown
items.desc: Toffu maps every step from ad click to purchase. It shows you exactly which step has the largest drop-off and how it changed over time.

items.title: Device and browser split
items.desc: Mobile vs desktop, Chrome vs Safari. If a new iOS update broke your checkout on iPhone, Toffu sees it in seconds, not after a week of lost revenue.

items.title: Traffic source isolation
items.desc: Drop-offs affect some channels more than others. Toffu tells you which campaigns are sending traffic that converts and which are sending traffic that bounces at step 2.

items.title: Date of change
items.desc: Something changed on a specific day. Toffu pins the exact date the drop started so you can correlate it with a deploy, a campaign change, or an external event.

items.title: Revenue impact calculation
items.desc: Not just a percentage. Toffu tells you how many dollars you lost per day since the leak started, so you know how urgent the fix is.

items.title: Actionable fix, not a report
items.desc: Toffu does not hand you a chart and walk away. It proposes the fix and executes it when you say go.

steps.title: Connect your stack
steps.desc: GA4, Google Ads, Meta Ads, Shopify. OAuth in 60 seconds. No data exports, no spreadsheets, no BI setup.

steps.title: Ask in plain English
steps.desc: 'My conversion rate dropped 34%, where is it leaking?' Toffu reads your actual data across every connected source and finds the answer.

steps.title: Fix it now
steps.desc: Toffu tells you what to do. If it's an ad budget shift, it executes it. If it's a dev fix, it tells you exactly what to flag.

afterSection.title: You know the leak. Now plug it.
afterSection.subhead: Toffu does not just identify problems. It acts on them when you say go.

items.title: Pause the campaigns bleeding into the broken funnel
items.desc: If mobile ads are sending traffic to a broken checkout, Toffu pauses them immediately to stop the bleeding.

items.title: Shift budget to what is converting
items.desc: Desktop campaigns, different ad sets, different channels. Toffu reallocates in seconds.

items.title: Monitor the fix
items.desc: After you fix the underlying issue, Toffu watches CVR recover and alerts you when it is back to baseline.

faq.question: Which analytics platforms does Toffu connect to?
faq.answer: GA4, Google Ads, Meta Ads, Shopify, and more. Most setups take under 5 minutes via OAuth.

faq.question: How is this different from just using GA4?
faq.answer: GA4 shows you the data. Toffu reads all of it, finds the anomaly, explains why it happened, and tells you what to fix. No funnel exploration, no segments, no exports.

faq.question: Can Toffu actually pause campaigns or does it just recommend?
faq.answer: Both. It recommends first and executes when you approve. You stay in control.

faq.question: What if the problem is a code bug, not a campaign?
faq.answer: Toffu tells you exactly which device, browser, and step to test. It gives you the information a developer needs to find and fix the issue fast.

finalCta.title: Your funnel is leaking right now.
finalCta.subhead: Every day you spend 3 hours in GA4 without an answer is revenue leaving through a hole you have not found yet.

seo.title: Find Your Funnel Leak in 8 Seconds | Toffu AI
seo.description: Your conversion rate dropped. Connect GA4, Meta, and Google Ads. Toffu finds the exact step, device, and date where users drop off and tells you what to fix.
seo.ogTitle: Find Your Funnel Leak in 8 Seconds
seo.ogDescription: Stop spending hours in GA4. Toffu connects your data and finds the exact drop-off in seconds.
